title: Professional Event A/V & Production Services
description: Professional audio and multi-camera coverage that protects the moment, keeps every word clear, and turns live events into polished assets.

faq.question: What kinds of events do you support?
faq.answer: The setup is built for community events, dinners, fundraisers, recitations, guest speakers, and other gatherings where clear sound and dependable production matter.

faq.question: What is needed from the venue before setup day?
faq.answer: The key requirements are access to the venue with enough setup time, a clear run-of-show, and confirmation of power, speaking positions, and any streaming needs.

faq.question: Can you handle both audio and video production together?
faq.answer: Yes. Depending on the package, the service can cover live sound, camera capture, highlight edits, and live-stream integration in one production setup.

value.name: The Essential PA Package
value.bestFor: Small halaqas, community dinners, and intimate recitations that need clean sound.
includes: Digital mixing with live EQ & compression
Dedicated on-site sound engineer (up to 4 hours)

value.name: Audio + Highlights Package
value.bestFor: Guest speakers, fundraisers, and special event recaps that need video plus clean audio.

value.name: Full Broadcast & Live Stream
value.bestFor: Major fundraisers, conferences, and high-impact VIP events that need broadcast-level coverage.
includes: Dedicated broadcast engineer for the full event
Full digital audio capture for archival use
